title: Sh*t Saves the World
overview: This documentary provides an intriguing and humorous glimpse into our species' impact on the Earth by exploring how one of the most simple and obvious solutions to aid the environment may lie in what we often look down upon as waste. It just may be that the hero we all need, but don't deserve, shall be apparent when 'Sh*t Saves the World.'
